author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
Sam Eagle gives a proper salute to all Disney Parks, but mostly Disneyland! #DisneyCelebratesAmerica
Greetings, and happy birthday, America.

In honor of the United States’ 250th birthday, I, Sam Eagle, present this official and highly respectable guide to celebrating at Disneyland Resort. From soaring proudly over the nation on Soarin’ Across America at Disney California Adventure, to securing a most distinguished Sam Eagle popcorn bucket, there are countless ways to demonstrate your patriotism (properly).

Take in the red, white, and blue splendor of patriotic décor across Main Street, U.S.A. 

Dine on festive, freedom-inspired eats and conclude the evening with the stirring spectacle of “Disney’s Celebrate America! – A Fourth of July Concert in the Sky”

Please note: enjoyment is permitted… so long as it is conducted with dignity. 🎆 

Celebrate America’s 250th at Disneyland Resort—responsibly, respectfully, and with just the right amount of fun. 

SUBSCRIBE: http://di.sn/6002ODIEQ

About Disneyland Resort:
Disneyland is where imagination is the destination. For young and old, big and small — it's The Happiest Place on Earth! So gather with all the people who make you the happiest and come to the place where dreams come true.

author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
Rock ‘n’ Roller Coaster? We’ll let our special guests decide how much rock ‘n’ rolling there is 🎸🎢
SUBSCRIBE: http://di.sn/6002ODIEQ

About Walt Disney World:
At Walt Disney World, you've got a whole fantastic world to celebrate in! With four spectacular theme parks and two water parks plus the most amazing shopping, dining, and recreation magic imaginable, it's no wonder all of life's special moments are made even more enjoyable when you celebrate at Walt Disney World.
